case_title: FERNANDO GASTELUM VS. WILDCATS OWNER LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY GASTELUM, FERNANDO AS TO DEFENDANT WILDCATS OWNER LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GASTELUM, FERNANDO AS TO DEFENDANT WILDCATS OWNER LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GABRIEL ROSENTHAL, GENERAL COUNSEL. FILED BY DEFENDANT WILDCATS OWNER LLC
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **NO SIGNATURE/SEE RECD BY & SIGNATURE LINE* SERVED OCT-06-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILDCATS OWNER LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FERNANDO GASTELUM IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILDCATS OWNER LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GABRIEL ROSENTHAL, GENERAL COUNSEL. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
